personal_brand.name: Adriana So
personal_brand.bio: I advise enterprise teams on agentic systems, AI adoption strategy, and the human-computer interfaces that drive them.

services.title: AI Workflow Design
services.description: Mapping complex organizational processes into deterministic, reliable LLM-driven sequences.

services.title: Agentic Systems
services.description: Architecting autonomous, headless deployments that execute independently and scale effortlessly.

services.title: AI Adoption Strategy
services.description: Providing executive-level roadmaps for embedding generative models into legacy data pipelines.

services.title: UX for AI
services.description: Designing human-centered interfaces that make probabilistic outputs feel tangible and trustworthy.

selected_works.title: Autonomous Deployment Framework
selected_works.description: A zero-maintenance, structured JSON CMS driven entirely by GitHub Actions and deterministic AI orchestration.

selected_works.title: Enterprise Knowledge Graph Integration
selected_works.description: Consolidated silos into an agent-accessible vector database, reducing engineering overhead by 40%.

philosophy.title: Structured Intelligence
philosophy.content: AI is most effective when constrained. My approach favors strict schemas, programmatic guardrails, and deterministic outcomes over unpredictable generative sprawl. Excellence lies in systems thinking, not prompt engineering alone.

social_proof.quote: Adriana's ability to navigate the operational complexities of agent deployments is unmatched. She brings clarity to a noisy domain.
